story.text:
# 🏛️ The Workshops

The workshops of the City of Mages — the constellation templates a Sovereign walks to forge an artefact: the Forge(t), the Tailor, the Hall, the Vault, the Jeweler, Etherchanting, Solchanting, the Bonfires, the Circle, the Covenant, the Holon, the Shield, the Threshold, and the Familiars.

- [[Workshop — Bonfires Dragon Fire V1]]
- [[Workshop — Chancery Clause V1]]
- [[Workshop — Circle Four Cardinal Garden V1]]
- [[Workshop — Covenant Personhood Inscribed V1]]
- [[Workshop — Etherchanting Commitment Cut V1]]
- [[Workshop — Familiars Companion Tame V1]]
- [[Workshop — Forget Commissioned Blade V1]]
- [[Workshop — Hall Bilateral Witness V1]]
- [[Workshop — Holon Hitchhikers Composition V1]]
- [[Workshop — Jeweler Gem Set V1]]
- [[Workshop — Portal Room Dispatch V1]]
- [[Workshop — Quartermaster Kitbag V1]]
- [[Workshop — Rostra Edict V1]]
- [[Workshop — Shield Shielded Memo V1]]
- [[Workshop — Solchanting Parallel Refraction V1]]
- [[Workshop — Staff Shop Hermes Fit V1]]
- [[Workshop — Tailor Cloak Weave V1]]
- [[Workshop — Vault Placed Reflection V1]]
- [[Workshop — Wellpool Manastone V1]]

---
← [[Welcome Visitors]]
